author: spencer_tb
content:
I'm proposing that we be optimistic and include all the remaining EIPs for `glamsterdam-devnet-5`:
- EIP-8038/2780 (likely 7904 will be dropped)
- EIP-8246/8070/7997/7610
- EIP-7954 changes: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11540 (merged)

To be discussed still:
- EIP-8037/7778 alignment: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11706
- EIP-8037/7702 clarifications: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11715

This is what I'd like us to aim for in STEEL for the first `glamsterdam-denvet-5` EELS release (tentatively, obviously things change). The most difficult changes will be the 8037/8038/2780 integration in my opinion.

author: misilva73
content: Sound good to me, If adding all EIPs is too much for people, I would still push to have the 8037/8038/2780 integration as first priority

author: draganrakita
content:
Wdyt about moving this to main chat, it could get lost in thread.

Do agree with full package shipped to `glam-devnet-5`. With this we basically have only two devnets and we can ship Glamsterdam.
